text: Let's learn how to save your current map and find it later! First, let's switch to the Data Phase.
Your maps are stored in the Library. Let's open the Saved Constellations accordion.

conditionText.text: The Saved Constellations library is already open!

text: Click this button to save a snapshot of your current map. (Go ahead and try it!)
Once saved, your map will appear in this list. You can click on it to rename it, share it, or load it back into the canvas at any time.
Let's switch back to the Map Phase.
